name: Henny Youngman
abstract: Henry "Henny" Youngman (March 16, 1906 – February 24, 1998) was an American comedian and musician famous for his mastery of the "one-liner", his best known being "Take my wife... please".

about_quotes.speaker: Sol Yaged
about_quotes.evidence: I played in shows with people like Jackie Mason, Henny Youngman, Buddy Hackett, Don Rickles.

about_quotes.evidence: So I get out of the taxicab at the hotel, and there’s Itzhak Perlman standing there... and here comes Henny Youngman. He said, he looked… And I said, “Hi,”
